title: T-037 — pick-lists + pick APIs (06-d)
prompt:
# T-037 — production pick-lists + pick

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.4 FR-SC-BE-040/041/042; 04-PLAN §12.3 reservations; 05-WH §9.1 FEFO
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Land `GET /pick-lists`, `GET /pick-list/:woId`, `POST /pick` for production pick workflows. POST /pick enforces FEFO via fefo_strategy_v1 rule and reservation matching.

## Implementation contract
1. GET /pick-lists: WO IN_PROGRESS|RELEASED with material_source='stock' unfulfilled reservations.
2. GET /pick-list/:woId: per 04-PLAN §12.3 reservation lines (RM root only) with FEFO suggestion top 1 + alternatives top 3.
3. POST /pick body `{ wo_id, bom_line_id, lp_id, qty_picked }`. Validations: reservation exists, LP matches reserved material, qty ≤ available, FEFO enforce ⇒ deviation requires reason_code (warn).
4. On success update wo_material_reservations.fulfilled_qty and insert stock_moves move_type='pick'.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/production/scanner/pick-lists/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/production/scanner/pick-list/[woId]/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/production/scanner/pick/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/server/services/production-pick.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/api/production-pick.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a WO in IN_PROGRESS with two BOM lines unfulfilled, when GET /pick-list/:woId runs, then it returns 2 lines each with FEFO suggestion top 1 and alternatives length 3
2. Given POST /pick with qty_picked > available, when validated, then 409 SC_LP_QTY_INSUFFICIENT and no rows are mutated
3. Given POST /pick with FEFO deviation and missing reason_code, when validated, then 400 SC_FEFO_DEVIATION_REASON_REQUIRED

## Test strategy
- RED: write production-pick.test.ts asserting list + qty-insufficient + FEFO-reason-required before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test api/production-pick'

## Risk red lines
- Do not let pick proceed without a valid reservation row
- Do not skip FEFO deviation reason_code requirement
- Do not let client override fulfilled_qty

pipeline_inputs.description: Pick-lists and pick endpoints for SCN-050; FEFO enforcement + reservation match + reason_code on deviation.
pipeline_inputs.details: Three handlers + production-pick service. List endpoints render WO + BOM line cards with FEFO suggestions. POST /pick validates reservation + LP + qty + FEFO deviation reason_code, transactionally updates fulfilled_qty + stock_moves.
